title: Branded Generic Gizont/Muzi/AtlaVox

test_results.notes: 890-950 MHz sweep captured with a RigExpert Zero II and AntScope2, no ground plane.

description: 17cm flexible whip sold under Gizont, muzi works, and AtlaVox names.
commentary: We really like these antennas, it's currently our most recommended antenna for pocket nodes. Shows up rebranded under several names (Gizont, muzi works, AtlaVox). muzi and Atlavox offer the most consistent/reliable option as AliExpress/Amazon sometimes sell knockoffs that perform worse.
